RawLine.description: Intermediate type for a single line entry.

capacity.description: Nested capacity object with direct and reverse MW limits.

entry_stage_id.description: Stage index when the line enters service. Absent or null = always exists.

exchange_cost.description:
Optional entity-level exchange cost override [$/`MWh`].
When absent, falls back to global `line_exchange_cost`.

exit_stage_id.description: Stage index when the line is decommissioned. Absent or null = never.

id.description: Line identifier. Must be unique within the file.

losses_percent.description: Transmission losses as percentage. Defaults to 0.0 when absent.

RawLineCapacity.description: Intermediate type for the nested capacity sub-object.

direct_mw.description: Maximum flow from source to target [MW].

reverse_mw.description: Maximum flow from target to source [MW].

description: Top-level intermediate type for `lines.json` (serde only, not re-exported).
title: RawLineFile
